title: agrostis alba var. verticillata
intro: Agrostis alba var. verticillata, also known as white bent or dew grass, is a perennial grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Agrostis alba var. verticillata include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to treat various health issues.
